sample_cases.job_description:
Senior Full-Stack Engineer - Fintech Platform

About Us:
We're a rapidly growing fintech startup processing $100M+ in transactions monthly.

Role Description:
Lead technical development of our core payment platform. You'll own services end-to-end, from database design to user-facing features.

Required Skills:
- 5+ years software development experience
- Expert-level Python (Django/FastAPI)
- Strong React/TypeScript for frontend
- AWS cloud architecture and optimization
- PostgreSQL & database design
- Docker & Kubernetes (production experience)
- REST API design & microservices
- Git & CI/CD pipelines
- System design & scalability
- SQL optimization for large datasets

Preferred Skills:
- Redis/caching strategies
- GraphQL experience
- AWS Lambda & serverless
- Payment processing domain knowledge
- Leadership/mentoring experience

Nice to Have:
- Open source contributions
- Machine learning basics
- DevOps experience

Compensation: $180-220K + equity
sample_cases.resume:
JOHN SMITH
john.smith@email.com | (415) 555-0123 | linkedin.com/in/johnsmith
San Francisco, CA

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Experienced Full-Stack Engineer with 4 years in building scalable web applications. Proficient in Python and JavaScript with hands-on experience in cloud infrastructure and database optimization. Successfully led migration of monolithic application to microservices, reducing API latency by 60%.

EXPERIENCE
Software Engineer II | TechCorp (2022-Present) | 2 years
- Led development of 3 microservices using Python and FastAPI
- Implemented Redis caching layer, reducing DB queries by 40%
- Owned MySQL database optimization (query optimization, indexing)
- Wrote 200+ REST API endpoints following OpenAPI standards
- Mentored 2 junior developers on best practices

Software Engineer | DataSystems Inc (2020-2022) | 2 years
- Built React/TypeScript frontend for data analytics platform
- Developed Python Django backend for ETL pipelines
- Set up Docker containerization for 5 services
- Experience with AWS RDS, EC2, and S3
- Basic Kubernetes knowledge from managed EKS cluster

Intern | StartupXYZ (Summer 2019) | 3 months
- Built simple REST APIs using Python Flask
- Frontend work with vanilla JavaScript

TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages: Python (Expert), JavaScript (Intermediate), TypeScript (Beginner), SQL (Advanced)
Backend: Django (Expert), FastAPI (Intermediate), Flask (Beginner)
Frontend: React (Intermediate), HTML/CSS (Intermediate)
Databases: MySQL (Advanced), PostgreSQL (Intermediate), Redis (Beginner)
Cloud: AWS (Intermediate) - EC2, RDS, S3, Lambda basics
DevOps: Docker (Intermediate), Kubernetes (Beginner), CI/CD (GitHub Actions basics)
Other: REST APIs (Expert), Microservices (Intermediate), System Design (Beginner)

EDUCATION
B.S. Computer Science | State University (2019)
Relevant Coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Database Systems, Web Development

CERTIFICATIONS
- AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner (2021)

OPEN SOURCE
- Minor contributions to Django REST Framework

ADDITIONAL
- Passionate about clean code and testing
- Active learner staying current with industry trends

assessment_summary.feedback: John has solid foundation with 4 years experience, but several critical gaps for senior role

critical_gaps.reason: Needed for React frontend work, currently weak

sample_cases.job_description:
Junior Backend Engineer - Python/Django

We're looking for a Junior Backend Engineer to join our growing team. You'll work on our Django-based SaaS platform serving 10,000+ customers.

Required Skills:
- Proficiency in Python (2+ years)
- Django framework experience (at least 1 year)
- SQL and relational databases
- REST API development
- Basic Git knowledge
- Linux/Unix command line basics

Preferred Skills:
- Experience with PostgreSQL
- Docker basics
- Testing (pytest/unittest)
- Agile/Scrum experience

Nice to Have:
- API documentation experience
- Cloud platform exposure (AWS/GCP/Azure)
- Message queues (Celery, Redis)

What We Offer:
- Mentorship from senior engineers
- Learning opportunities
- Growth path to mid-level engineer
sample_cases.resume:
SARAH JOHNSON
sarah.j@email.com | (415) 555-9876
GitHub: github.com/sarahjohnson
San Jose, CA

OBJECTIVE
Eager junior developer seeking backend engineering role to apply academic knowledge and grow technical skills in production environment.

EXPERIENCE
Junior Software Developer (Internship) | TechBootcamp Co (6 months, 2023)
- Developed 5 Django REST API endpoints for task management application
- Wrote SQL queries for user analytics dashboard
- Created unit tests using pytest (80% code coverage)
- Used Git for version control and collaborated with 3 developers
- Fixed 15+ bugs reported by QA team

Education Projects:
- Built blog platform with Django (from course, GitHub repo)
- Created RESTful todo API following REST principles
- Implemented user authentication and authorization

TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages: Python (Intermediate), JavaScript (Beginner), SQL (Beginner)
Backend: Django (Intermediate), DRF - Django REST Framework (Intermediate)
Databases: PostgreSQL (Beginner), SQLite (Beginner)
Tools: Git (Beginner), Linux (Beginner), Docker (Beginner - aware only)
Testing: pytest (Beginner), unittest (Beginner)
Other: REST API (Beginner), HTML/CSS (Beginner)

EDUCATION
Python Backend Developer Bootcamp | TechBootcamp Academy (2023) - 12 weeks
B.S. Information Technology | Community College (2022)

CURRENTLY LEARNING
- Advanced Django patterns
- PostgreSQL database design
- Test-driven development
- Docker containerization

CERTIFICATIONS
- Python Developer Basics (Udemy)

PORTFOLIO PROJECTS
- Django Blog Platform (source: GitHub)
- REST API Todo App (source: GitHub)
- E-commerce Product Catalog (incomplete, learning project)

expected_output.feedback: Sarah is well-prepared for this junior role. Strong Python and Django fundamentals with some gaps in PostgreSQL and testing.

test_job_descriptions.ml_engineer:
Machine Learning Engineer

Requirements:
- Python (3+ years)
- Deep learning (PyTorch/TensorFlow)
- Computer vision or NLP
- ML ops & MLflow
- Cloud platforms
- Statistics & mathematics
- Linux/Docker

Preferred:
- Kaggle competitions
- Research publications
- Edge ML
test_job_descriptions.devops_engineer:
DevOps/SRE Engineer

Requirements:
- Kubernetes (production experience)
- Docker & containerization
- CI/CD (Jenkins, GitLab CI)
- Infrastructure as Code (Terraform/CloudFormation)
- Monitoring (Prometheus, Grafana)
- Linux system administration
- Cloud (AWS/GCP/Azure)
- Scripting (Bash, Python)

Preferred:
- Helm charts
- Service mesh (Istio/Linkerd)
- Security hardening
test_job_descriptions.data_engineer:
Data Engineer

Requirements:
- SQL (advanced)
- Python/Scala
- Big data (Spark, Hadoop)
- Data warehousing
- ETL pipeline design
- Cloud data platforms (Snowflake/BigQuery)
- Data modeling

Preferred:

- Data quality frameworks
- DBT or similar tools
